dct_title_s: Prima pars descriptionis itineris navalis in Indiam Orientalem : earumque rerum quae navibus Battavis occurrerunt: una cum particulari enarratione conditionum, morum, oeconomiae populorum, quos adnavigarunt. Praeterea de numismatis, aromatibus, speciebus & mercibus ibidem venalibus, eorumque pretio. Insuper de insularum apparentijs, tractibus, orisque regionum maritimis, una cum incolarum ad vivum delineatione; cuncta diversis tabulis illustrata: omnibus mare navigantibus & rerum exterarum studiosis, lectu periucunda
dct_alternative_sm: Lodewycksz, Willem, active 16th century. Prima pars descriptionis itineris navalis in Indiam Orientalem
dct_description_sm: authore G. M. A. W. L.
First 4 and last 4 pages blank (included in page description).
Title page includes map of Europe, Asia, and Africa.
Maps and illustrations contain indexes for places and items, respectively.
Decorative cartouches, compass roses, rhumb lines, figures, fauna, ships.
Maps show bird's eye views of villages, including surrounding topography, vegetation, waterways, ports.
Illustrations include figures, fauna, and flora, with descriptive text.

Map 1. Typus expeditionis nauticae Battavoru in Javam, absolutae 1597 -- Map 2. Baixo di Judia [inset: De Baij van A. de S. Bras] -- Map 3. Insula de S. Lavretij [4 inset maps: Insula de S. Maria -- D. Baija Dantongil -- T'hollansche kerckhof -- Porto de S Augustino] -- Map 4. [Spakenbourch and S. Angero] -- Map 5. [Pula dua Batto] -- Map 6. [Delineatio urbis Bantam, eo modo quo partita est.] -- Map 7. [I. Balij] -- Map 8. [S Helena] [2 inset maps: West Zijde -- Noort Zijde]
dct_publisher_sm: ex officina Cornelij Nicolaj, typographi ad sybolum diarij, ad aquam,
